productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Minnie Orange Stripped Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton t-shirt with bow straps and MinnieWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitA smiling Minnie reflects the smiling face of your little boy in this 3/4th length orange and white striped set. The bow straps will hold it firm while your little one cools off in the cotton wear this summer.
